planets.name: Mercury
planets.description: The smallest planet in our solar system and nearest to the Sun.
planets.funFact: A year on Mercury is just 88 Earth days long!

planets.name: Venus
planets.description: The hottest planet in our solar system with a thick, toxic atmosphere.
planets.funFact: Venus rotates backwards compared to most planets!

planets.name: Earth
planets.description: Our home planet, the only known planet with life.
planets.funFact: Earth is the only planet not named after a god!

planets.name: Mars
planets.description: The Red Planet, with the largest dust storms in the solar system.
planets.funFact: Mars has the tallest mountain in the solar system - Olympus Mons!

planets.name: Jupiter
planets.description: The largest planet in our solar system with a Great Red Spot storm.
planets.funFact: Jupiter's Great Red Spot is a storm larger than Earth!

planets.name: Saturn
planets.description: Famous for its spectacular ring system made of ice and rock.
planets.funFact: Saturn is less dense than water - it would float!

planets.name: Uranus
planets.description: Tilted on its side and rotates backwards.

planets.name: Neptune
planets.description: The windiest planet with speeds reaching 2,100 km/h.
planets.funFact: Neptune has the fastest winds in the solar system!
